title: Subotica, Vojvodina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Subotica, Vojvodina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Subotica is a city in Vojvodina with a population of 97,000. A city in northern Vojvodina near the Hungarian border, known for its stunning Art Nouveau architecture and the nearby Palić Lake.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
